captions.formal: Experience the dynamic flow of autumn in South Korea as urban traffic blends seamlessly with the vibrant yellow ginkgo trees lining this busy city avenue.
captions.sarcastic: Because nothing screams 'enjoying the peaceful autumn colors' like rushing through a multi-lane intersection at supersonic speed. At least the ginkgo trees had the decency to stand still.
captions.humorous_tech: South Korea's autumn update is looking great, but the frame rate on these cars is causing some serious motion blur. Clearly, the rendering budget went entirely into those high-definition yellow ginkgo trees.
captions.humorous_non_tech: It looks like everyone in South Korea is racing to get a look at those gorgeous yellow ginkgo trees. Either that, or they are all late for an important meeting at Korea Illies Engineering.

captions.formal: A dedicated professional demonstrates deep focus and productivity while working at her desk in a modern open-plan office.
captions.sarcastic: Nothing screams 'uninterrupted concentration' quite like typing away in an open-plan office with just a black partition screen for privacy.
captions.humorous_tech: When you stare at a large computer screen with enough focus, you hope the white keyboard knows exactly what you're trying to input.
captions.humorous_non_tech: Hoping that if I look busy enough typing at my desk, the office plants will take care of the rest of my tasks.
